# Pull Request

<!-- Document role: Managed pull-request template. Sync destination: .github/pull_request_template.md. -->

## Summary
-

## Changes
-

## Requirements / Spec Alignment
- [ ] Provided specifications, acceptance criteria, issues, or tickets were reviewed
- [ ] Conflicts or unclear requirements were reported

## Documentation
- [ ] Project documentation was updated if needed
- [ ] No invented features, claims, screenshots, benchmarks, or compatibility guarantees

## Validation
- [ ] Build ran or the skip reason is documented
- [ ] Relevant tests ran or the skip reason is documented
- [ ] Smoke/manual checks ran where practical
- [ ] Format/lint checks ran where configured
- [ ] The implementation was rechecked against the task and changed files

## Branching / Merge Safety
- [ ] Repository Git instructions were followed
- [ ] The pull request targets the repository's documented integration branch
- [ ] No auto-merge or branch-protection bypass was requested or performed

## CI/CD / Deployment Impact
- [ ] CI/CD, deployment, publishing, permissions, and secrets were unchanged
- [ ] If changed, the intended behavior and validation are documented

## Notes / Risks
-
